response:
Sec. 1  
peanuts are a type of food that contains proteins which can trigger allergic reactions in some people  
allergic reactions can cause symptoms such as hives or difficulty breathing  
these reactions can be severe and life-threatening  
people who are allergic to peanuts cannot eat them  
underwater environments do not contain peanuts  
peanuts are not found in water  
the absence of peanuts in water does not affect the allergic response of people who are allergic to them  

Sec. 2  
people who are allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because they are not exposed to peanuts in water  
the allergic reaction is not affected by the environment  
the body's immune system does not respond to peanuts in water  
the presence of peanuts in water does not trigger an allergic reaction  
the immune system does not recognize peanuts as a threat in water
